DateTimeUtc.description: a string to be decoded into a DateTime.Utc

DeprecationNotice.description: A structured deprecation declaration attached to a public surface.
DeprecationNotice.title: Deprecation Notice

DeprecationUse.description: A recorded runtime use of a deprecated public surface.
DeprecationUse.title: Deprecation Use

DeprecationUsedEvent.description: Emitted after a deprecated surface use is recorded; telemetry and embedding subscribers should consume it as a late observer.
DeprecationUsedEvent.title: Deprecation Used Event
